## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Builds with ESP-IDF
- [ ] No Arduino usage
- [ ] No unbounded blocking waits
- [ ] Errors handled explicitly
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changes

## Review Focus
- FreeRTOS safety
- Memory safety
- Thread safety
- OTA safety
- API/security impact
